nasb.text: He lived in the wilderness of Paran, and his mother took a wife for him from the land of Egypt.

esv.text: He lived in the wilderness of Paran, and his mother took a wife for him from the land of Egypt.

cnv.text: 他住在巴蘭的曠野，他的母親從埃及地給他娶了一個妻子。

ccb.text: 他住在巴兰旷野，他母亲为他娶了一个埃及女子。

csbs.text: 他住在巴兰旷野，他母亲从埃及地为他娶了妻子。
